channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: EU opens MiCA consultation to review if crypto framework is still fit for purpose
item.description: The European Commission is seeking feedback on whether the EU’s landmark crypto regulatory framework remains suitable as digital asset markets and global policies evolve.

item.title: South Carolina Passes Law Banning CBDCs While Protecting Crypto Users, Bitcoin Miners
item.description: The crypto-friendly legislation was signed into law on Tuesday, granting protections to crypto users, developers, and Bitcoin miners.

item.title: 🚨NEW: SEC Commissioner and head of the Crypto Task Force @HesterPeirce will join Virginia’s Regent University Law School as an Associate Professor in November, according to a university press release circulated today, signaling her tenure at the agenc - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFBrdzliTFlVbkdfdW5FcGNXbkQxVzdRYkI0X2ZWLVVwcHJGckN3QzAtaWZSZ3VPT3ZCOW85X2IyN3QxS2ZOcUdPRzM5cFc3S0ZtdzZKUnFqZjFJSjRwZjExUGZTWjdzZw?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨NEW: SEC Commissioner and …

item.title: Crypto campaign cash from Fairshake flooded Southern primaries, picked winners
item.description: The leading industry super PAC claimed a "6-0 sweep" in the primaries in Kentucky, Alabama and Georgia, though one big race awaits a runoff.

item.title: Ethereum traders warn of a ‘nasty’ ETH price drop if $2K support breaks
item.description: Ethereum is flashing a warning of a familiar bearish pattern that preceded a 41% drop in January, raising risks of a fresh breakdown.

item.title: South Korean funeral company reveals $33 million loss on leveraged ether ETF bet
item.description: A Seoul-based funeral services firm disclosed tens of millions of dollars in unrealized losses tied to leveraged ether ETF investments.

item.title: AI Watchdog Warns of 'Rogue Deployment' Risk at Top Labs, With Capabilities Growing Fast
item.description: Independent assessment finds AI agents at major companies can cheat, deceive, and work unsupervised—but lack the sophistication for a sustained takeover.

item.title: EU opens consultation on MiCA stablecoin rules and DeFi gaps
item.description: EU opens MiCA review as consultation probes stablecoin interest rules, DeFi risks and classification gaps ahead of July's crypto authorization deadline.

item.title: Live markets: Crypto prices buoyed by Trump's 'final stages' remark
item.description: Bitcoin is lower by more than 4% over the past week, but has remained in a very tight range around $77,000 for the last three days.

item.title: Raoul Pal says AI and crypto are reshaping the global economy faster than most think
item.description: The Real Vision founder said that humanity is entering an “exponential age” where AI, crypto and tokenization could rewrite finance, labor and culture.

item.title: Vitalik Buterin outlines Ethereum's privacy measures. Here is what it means for the network and ETH
item.description: Privacy is widely seen as a necessary feature for the widespread adoption of blockchain technology. Ethereum is taking steps in that direction.

item.title: HYPE Surges 101% This Year: What’s Driving Hyperliquid’s Growth?
item.description: Hyperliquid's HYPE token has decoupled from Bitcoin with 101% YTD gains as the platform's revenue explodes across multiple sectors.

item.title: Fireblocks launches agentic payment support, joins x402 Foundation
item.description: If even a fraction of the more than 1 billion people who use AI daily delegate authority to AI agents for online spending, stablecoin adoption would grow substantially, a Fireblocks executive said.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Uniswap (UNI), up 3.7%, leads index higher
item.description: Bittensor (TAO) gained 2.1%, joining Uniswap (UNI) as a top performer.

item.title: This Bitcoin price model targets ‘conservative’ $255K by year-end
item.description: Earlier, analysts at Bernstein and BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes also projected Bitcoin to reach new record highs in 2026.

item.title: Singapore revokes crypto payment license of Bsquared over regulatory breaches
item.description: MAS found deficiencies in Bsquared’s risk management and conflict-of-interest policies, and that the firm had provided false or misleading information to the regulator on multiple occasions.

item.title: Crypto Wealth Firm Nexo Sponsors $3 Million Golf Tournament at Trump International Scotland
item.description: Trump International Golf Links will again host the DP World Tour's Nexo Championship, now with a $3 million prize pool.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 South Carolina Governor signs bill into law that permits businesses to use Bitcoin & crypto for transactions and prohibits the government from transacting in a CBDC 👏 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFB3Uk1pUVBoZV9rUUpjT3pBYkZucTljYVJQbnlxMEcteXdPRG1BVXI4TFZEdktRSDU4YXFzNWJHQWU3TmtfYWJTS013TTFFV0N5UTkyeWh3cDBjekdaVTNGT0s2OUpNVlE?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 South Carolin…

item.title: Morning Minute: Markets Flip Green Overnight Ahead of NVDA Earnings
item.description: Crypto majors and stocks are back in the green, while Polymarket just opened private company prediction markets to retail.

item.title: Trump Orders Fed to Review Crypto Firms’ Access to Master Accounts
item.description: The order asks the Fed to review crypto firms’ access to payment rails, putting its control over master accounts under scrutiny.

item.title: Bits to Bricks: Merchant Settlement is Where Stablecoins Work
item.description: Alex Wilson, Co-founder and CEO of Cyclops joins Amira Valliani on Bits to Bricks to unpack how stablecoin infrastructure in the long-term bet.

item.title: These bitcoin metrics suggest February’s $60,000 selloff may have marked the bottom
item.description: Realized cap stabilization, historically elevated RHODL readings and deeply negative funding rates all point toward a potential cycle low for bitcoin forming earlier this year.

item.title: How Blockchain Intelligence Uncovered a Million-Euro Bitcoin Ordinals Tax Fraud Scheme
item.description: Summary Criminals are increasingly turning to novel digital asset classes, like Bitcoin Ordinals and BRC-20 tokens, to generate and conceal… The post How Blockchain Intelligence Uncovered a Million-Euro Bitcoin Ordinals Tax Fraud Scheme ap…

item.title: Bitcoin’s momentum is fading: Traders have these support levels in mind
item.description: Bitcoin momentum is fading following drop to $76,000 as analysts warn a loss of key support at $74,000-$76,000 could trigger a deeper BTC price correction.

item.title: Telegram group at center of Jane Street insider-trading allegations in Terra collapse
item.description: Newly unsealed filings detail a private chat dubbed ‘Bryce’s Secret’ that Terraform’s estate says gave Jane Street an informational edge before UST’s collapse.

item.title: Too many cooks: How regulatory infighting is choking the UK's crypto hub ambitions
item.description: While the FCA opens its doors to market pilots, structural delays and legislative friction are fueling industry frustration over a framework trailing behind the U.S. and Europe.

item.title: South Carolina governor signs bill protecting Bitcoin miners, banning CBDC
item.description: Senate Bill 163 bans CBDC payments by state agencies and shields Bitcoin miners from discriminatory zoning and licensing rules.

item.title: Bitcoin rebounds above $77,000. Analysts weigh in on whether the bounce has legs.
item.description: Your day-ahead look for May 20, 2026

item.title: Bitcoin holds near $77,400 as derivatives signal caution
item.description: Crypto markets flashed green on Wednesday, but falling futures open interest and mixed altcoin performances suggest traders are reducing risk rather than chasing the rebound.

item.title: Bitfinex traders double down on bitcoin during five-day slide as longs hit 2.5-year high
item.description: Margin longs on Bitfinex have climbed to a two-and-a-half year high as bitcoin struggles below key technical resistance near $78,000.

item.title: Euro stablecoin project Qivalis adds 25 banks ahead of launch
item.description: Qivalis expands to 37 banks after adding 25 new members across 15 countries, boosting euro stablecoin plans ahead of a second-half 2026 launch.

item.title: Trump's Truth Social Pulls Bitcoin ETF Application From SEC Review
item.description: Trump Media & Technology Group has withdrawn its Form S-1 registrations for Bitcoin and Bitcoin-Ethereum ETFs.

item.title: Despite Trump’s pledge, a CBDC is being explored behind closed doors, says former CTFC chair
item.description: Publicly, the U.S. has fiercely opposed a Central Bank Digital Currency, but former CFTC Chairman Timothy Massad said it is inevitable and there will be one sooner or later.

item.title: LATEST: 📈 Bitwise says Hyperliquid’s HYPE is one of crypto’s most undervalued assets, citing roughly $800M-$1B in estimated annualized revenue and a valuation of 10x–14x its buyback stream. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5FYTdvRXVFQXM2NEMtd1FQVEFJM3FVOERDUEt6WlVjOV9XWDcxTWZ6aC1URnFZbmc4azFPY0RMUVZKRjBjM1JyeXp6eUlFcGRGbUpSeFNfdkFqTWd0RkhNWlBiZUk?oc=5" target="_blank">LATEST: 📈 Bitwise says Hyperli…

item.title: Germany's AllUnity plans Swedish krona stablecoin, pushes into AI agentic payments
item.description: The DWS and Galaxy-backed firm targets June debut for its SEKAU stablecoin as Europe pushes to build regulated local-currency alternatives to U.S. dollar tokens.

item.title: OpenAI launches overseas AI lab in Singapore with $234M commitment
item.description: OpenAI is opening its first overseas applied AI lab in Singapore through a $234 million partnership expected to create more than 200 technical roles.

item.title: Pan-European stablecoin effort expands to 37 lenders in push back against U.S. dollar dominance
item.description: Qivalis, a stablecoin initiative backed by a group of European banks, aims to issue a stablecoin later this year to deepen the euro's role in tokenized finance.

item.title: Bitwise calls HYPE ‘most mispriced’ crypto despite 77% rise this year
item.description: Bitwise’s Matt Hougan says Hyperliquid’s token is not priced as if it is tied to a “global super-app,” arguing the platform is more than just a crypto platform.

item.title: Trump orders review of fintech firms' access to Fed payment services
item.description: Financial regulators are also asked to review regulations that could be amended to streamline applications for eligible fintech firms seeking bank and credit union charters.

item.title: ⚖️NEW: Trump orders Fed to grant crypto firms DIRECT access to master accounts. This could let crypto firms move money more like banks instead of depending on banks to do it for them. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE9kRkJkbElIMmZiVFdNaVN5dzg2cktyRFRubUx5dklhamRFS29sdXA2Y2RnV3lkZklkRTNjYWxvd2c1Q2VUYXVZZDZDRU41UFY4MV9kZDZwSDZpV2Y1VFlWYg?oc=5" target="_blank">⚖️NEW: Trump orders Fed to grant cry…

item.title: GitHub investigates unauthorized access to internal repositories
item.description: GitHub said the activity involved the exfiltration of about 3,800 internal repositories, and it removed the malicious code extension.

item.title: Bitcoin, ether, XRP rebound as Senate curbs Trump's Iran war powers
item.description: Bitcoin climbed to about $77,200, while XRP, ether and solana also gained as Treasury yields and oil fell.

item.title: Meta begins 8K global job cuts, starting in Singapore
item.description: Approximately 49,000 workers were laid off in 2026 as companies adopted a more AI-reliant business model.

item.title: Short-term things being done to shift Ethereum toward native privacy: * AA + FOCIL (makes privacy protocol txs, among many other things, first-class with strong inclusion guarantees) * Keyed nonces: x.com/soispoke/statu… * Access-layer work (Kohaku, privat - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFAyNGdtVXFWZTdNQmg1bElGNXVfUWw4czJlWkEybDhReXlKcFByTUt1Q2lWN00tWEpKNGdZZTN0LW5RUkdKbWZUazB6MXRBdUZUMzUzelhIeEFkMDJaaVBYbjlnMWU4QQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Short-term things being done…

item.title: Non-dollar stablecoins are struggling to crack 0.5% of market share
item.description: Everyone is building non-dollar stablecoins. But data shows that compared to USD-denominated stablecoins, almost no one is using them.

item.title: Bitcoin is falling, bond yields are rising. Yet BTC’s implied volatility, an uncertainty gauge, remains low.
item.description: BTC's implied volatility remains low despite the recent price selloff. Options specialist prefers a long straddle strategy in this scenario.

item.title: US Senate advances resolution to curb Trump’s Iran war powers
item.description: “Congress has the power to slam the brakes on this unwise conflict,” said bill sponsor and Democratic Senator Tim Kaine.

item.title: WLFI-linked AI Financial flags ‘going concern’ as losses mount
item.description: AI Financial Corp. posted a net loss of $271.5 million in the first quarter of 2026 as it flagged significant doubt about its ability to continue operating for the next 12 months.

item.title: Bankr temporarily disables transactions after 14 wallets hacked
item.description: Bankr recommends that affected users create a new wallet, generate a new seed phrase on a clean device and revoke approvals if remaining assets can’t be moved.

item.title: Trump-backed Truth Social pulls bids for crypto ETFs
item.description: The crypto ETFs were intended to be part of Trump Media & Technology Group’s broader crypto strategy, which included the launch of the Truth.fi financial platform.

item.title: 🚨 LATEST: Trump's Truth Social has withdrawn its Bitcoin ETF filing with the SEC. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE91OXN2WGxsZVJaZFRkemZSOVhPQnB0UWVXTmpYTF9UTXZya3dlSEtLNUxOM2xjTWxIZk1hLUVNSWhrZ1F5TGNsQ3NNLTAzbWg0VF91LUo3UDJrZlUwNmlaM2xDZ0c?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 LATEST: Trump's Truth Social…

item.title: Solana futures funding rate turns negative: Is $78 SOL next?
item.description: Solana futures funding turned negative as demand for SOL and its associated decentralized exchanges fell. Will traders buy the dip or is $78 next?

item.title: "A Breakthrough": White House Says Strategic Bitcoin Reserve Announcement Is Imminent - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE00Yk5KeUNrSjFuc1BmMnNBYlQ4TnA0Y0JuV1FzVy1adVk2bV84Um5OODlxYWdRSHIwemtoenR1c1dLMWN2NE1WVHhCenZoXzFpWi02OGZqcHJ4bUdRdDd3?oc=5" target="_blank">"A Breakthrough": White House Says Str…

item.title: Trump orders government, Fed to review crypto firms' access to payment rails
item.description: Donald Trump's executive order asks the Fed to review how depository institutions may be granted access to payment services, an area the crypto industry is deeply involved with.

item.title: $ALGO is now available to trade on Robinhood Crypto, including NY. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE1PZHBCMlQ4OHdLXzdrQkJ1OUlUR2NROXpTdW9ZMXpheVhibVJsdnpZaV9ucGRBYXpJUkZnWmI1ZC1SdDFIQURTeEdadjdXd05NSEdqaFJQNXByMElxWkRZT1pIRQ?oc=5" target="_blank">$ALGO is now available to trade …

item.title: CFTC sues Minnesota, Governor Tim Walz over prediction markets ban
item.description: About 24 hours after Minnesota Governor Tim Walz signed a bill into law passed by the state’s legislature to effectively ban prediction markets in the state, the CFTC pushed back with its own lawsuit.

item.title: After Nearly a Decade, Gary Gensler's Poster Child for Crypto Compliance Executes Its First Trade
item.description: After weathering years of industry skepticism and navigating a shifting regulatory landscape, Prometheum executed its first crypto trades.

item.title: Bernstein: Bitcoin miners becoming critical suppliers in AI infrastructure
item.description: Bernstein says miners control 27 GW of planned power and $90 billion in AI deals, giving them a strategic edge as electricity becomes the main constraint on data center growth.

item.title: Minnesota Bans Prediction Markets—And Is Sued By the Trump Admin Hours Later
item.description: Minnesota's ban has made it a felony to create or operate a prediction market in the state. The CFTC and DOJ say it violates federal law.

item.title: Americans Arrested in Japan for Entering Punch the Monkey’s Zoo Home to Promote Meme Coin
item.description: Viral Japanese macaque monkey Punch received unwelcome visitors this week, as trespassers attempted to promote a Solana meme coin.
